userStories.title: Add Stripe checkout upsell CTA
userStories.description: Add prominent upgrade button in dashboard that links to Stripe checkout. Track click-throughs.

userStories.title: X share button with tracked virality
userStories.description: Add 'Share on X' buttons to dashboard. Track shares via UTM params.

userStories.title: Lemon Squeezy affiliate link embed
userStories.description: Add affiliate link storage and display for partner products. Commission tracking.

userStories.title: Cold email capture on signup drop-off
userStories.description: If user starts signup but doesn't complete, show modal offering 'early access' in exchange for email.

userStories.title: Retention nag for expired trials
userStories.description: Send notification when trial expires with upgrade prompt. Track conversion.
